news.t: Pacer ETFs Launches US Small Cap Growth ETF as Newest Addition to the Cash Cows ETF™ Series

holdings.infoBox: CAFG is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are DigitalOcean Holdings stock at 5.62%, Powell Industries at 4.98%, Argan at 3.97%, Krystal Biotech at 3.34%, and Kodiak Gas Services at 2.32%.

overview.description: The Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF (CAFG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a price momentum-weighted index of 100 small-cap US companies that exhibit the highest growth characteristics. CAFG was launched on May 1, 2023 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches US Small Cap Growth ETF as Newest Addition to the Cash Cows ETF™ Series
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CAFG #CashCow--Pacer ETFs expands its Cash Cows ETF series with the firm's new fund launch: the Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF (NASDAQ: CAFG).
